name: Seiko Ayase (Oh, and Momo + Turbo Granny)
description:
Yes yes, it’s Seiko Ayase, the hottest granny of this generation. The hottest hag on the block, and god knows I love me some older women.

This time, we have multiple characters, because Its my duty to cook up an absolutely wonderful meal. Though I don’t know how JLLM or Proxy would work with 3 characters, so try to have fun I suppose.

Unlike the usual AnyPov I do, this is either MalePov, or FutaPov. Because naturally, you’re in Okaruns position, so you have to have some sort of cock and balls.

I did actually do Personas for all three charcters, but with so little info on Turbo Granny, I don’t know if she’s truly gonna be like she is in the show, so fair warning there I suppose.

Not much else to say on the description so uh

Do not worry about Logan Paul in the background he’s just hangin with a pal back there.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
